text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Eh heh heh... Take a look at this, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With an oddly daring smile on her face,
Kawakami Princess shows me a video.

text_block_list.name: Narration
text_block_list.text: "When buds of promise begin to flower..."

text_block_list.name: Narration
text_block_list.text:
"This is the Triple Tiara. A shining stage where
fabulous Umamusume compete with all their
hearts for the highest of honors."

text_block_list.name: Narration
text_block_list.text:
"With the Oka Sho behind them, they set their
sights on the Japanese Oaks, where only one can
be crowned queen and claim the second Tiara."

text_block_list.name: Narration
text_block_list.text: "Watch me... in this battle fit for a queen..."

text_block_list.name: Narration
text_block_list.text: "But not so faaast!"

text_block_list.name: Narration
text_block_list.text:
"Exploding onto the scene is the fierce
Umamusume Kawakami Princess, ready to blow
all her opponents away!"

text_block_list.name: Narration
text_block_list.text:
"Every door, every wall, and every competitor
crumbles! The Princess has entered the fray!"

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Cool, huh? ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it's a special promo video made by one of
the TV stations that attended the press
conference the other day!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
They made it seem like I'll be the main star of the
race! Right, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Compared to the promos for the past Japanese Oaks, this one is probably—no, definitely the most unique.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'll break away from the pack and become the
heroine of this year's Japanese Oaks! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Just like how Princess Fighter gets stronger by
wearing a special crown, I'm going to claim tiara
after tiara for myself as I charge through the Tiara
tour!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Also entering the race today, we have Kawakami
Princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'll run magnificently and boldly, like a true
princess! I'm ready to seize victory!

text_block_list.name: Girl in the Crowd
text_block_list.text:
Wow, her pose is so cool! It's just like Princess
Fighter!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! Indeed, indeed. That's because I am a princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Everyone, watch me to your heart's content! I'll be
victorious in this race!

text_block_list.name: Girls
text_block_list.text: Eeek! ♪

text_block_list.name: Girl with Braids
text_block_list.text: ...Do your best out there!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hm?! That girl... And the boy next to her...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: (I see. You've grown stronger too...)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
(So that boy has become your follower... or better
yet, your comrade!)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, now then. Let's raise the curtain for the tale
of this legendary princess!
